title.en: After a while, he ran out of all the purple sto...

content.en:
Fivefold Dao Realm cultivation, coupled with the fact that he had just comprehended the rules of the Sixth Sequence Dao Realm, Ye Tian's current strength had far surpassed that of the top Sevenfold Dao Realm.

"I should be between the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm and the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm, much more powerful than the invincible powerhouse of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, but not as good as the Eightfold Dao Realm!" Ye Tian muttered.

There is no way, the sixth sequence of supreme dao rules he comprehended are just scratching the surface, and he has not created the sixth sequence of supreme dao supernatural powers, so his strength is naturally inferior to the eightfold supreme dao realm.

When he cultivated to reach the peak of the Fivefold Supreme Dao Realm, and then created the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Divine Power, then his strength would be comparable to the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm, and it was still not a weak Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm.

"My Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Realm is too low, I have to continue to improve!"

Ye Tian refined the remaining purple stones one by one to comprehend the rules of the sixth sequence of the Supreme Dao, the effect was still there, but it was not big, and the damage from eroding the origin was still so serious.

After a while, he ran out of all the purple stones.

"The purple stones are gone, we need more purple stones!"

Ye Tian looked at the map left by the Wuji Heavenly Emperor, the place marked on this map might have the purple stone he needed, if this was really the case, he might be able to go there and take a look.

However, it was relatively far away, and at his speed, he would have to travel hundreds of thousands of times to the Dao Era to be able to get there.

"Send a replica body to take a look!"

A copy of Ye Tian's body urged the sixth sequence to the Dao Rule with a slight stroke, tearing through the Infinite Domain and entering the Void Domain.

He didn't plan to go to the fortress to teleport, that would expose his whereabouts, and he was just a Dao Realm under the command of Taisu Palace, and to use the teleportation of one fortress after another, he would inevitably need to get the permission of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, so he would have to let Taisu Palace operate, which would be a little troublesome.

So, he'd better shuttle through it himself.

With his current strength, he shouldn't encounter too many dangers on the way, unless he encounters that powerful Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon.

If you are really unlucky and killed, then send another copy body, it is not a big problem.

......

Heavenly Blood Battlefield.

Heavenly Blood City III.

Ye Tian changed all his duplicate bodies, and his cultivation also became the early stage of the Fivefold Dao Realm.

"With my current strength, I can sweep the Heavenly Blood Battlefield!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Heavenly Blood Battlefield also has an existence in the Fifth Rank Dao Realm and takes the path of the strongest to the Dao, but the opponent's seventh sequence to the Dao rule realm is not high, and he has comprehended the sixth sequence of the Dao rule, where can the other party compare with him.

Ye Tian is now ready to sweep through the Heavenly Blood Battlefield and kill all those powerful Supreme Dao Void Demons, or even, directly block the Void Passage, then the other Supreme Dao Void Demons will not be able to leave.

Of course, the Supreme Dao Void Demon can ask for help, such as calling the peerless demon at the peak of the Sixfold Supreme Dao, no less than a strong man like the Taibai Sword Master, then he can't beat it.

However, you can kill as many Dao Void Demons as you can.

"Kill the Dao Void Demon Battle River first!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

On the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, on the side of the Dao Void Demon, Ye Tian's copy body of the Dao Void Demon infiltrated and hid itself with the sixth sequence of Dao rules.

This replica body is not impossible to find, if the opponent's special Eight Patterns Supreme Dao weapon locks his position, it is possible to find his replica body.

After all, there is still a secret connection between them, I think he was locked by the Wuji Heavenly Emperor at the beginning, and all the other replica bodies were killed.

However, now that he was using the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule to protect himself, it would not be easy to be discovered, and they would not have thought of this to target him.

So, the risk of his exposure is very low and very low.

Ye Tian sneaked in, mainly to find Zhanhe, he was afraid that he would kill and Zhanhe would run away, so he first found Zhanhe, killed it, and then started to kill.

Soon.

He found the traces of the battle river, and the other party stayed in the second fortress of Heavenly Blood.

Subsequently, Ye Tian's Supreme Dao Void Demon Replica Body was in a ruin not far away from the Heavenly Blood No. 2 Fortress, where it silently condensed the True Body Replica Body.

Soon, the real body copied the body and successfully condensed.

Swish!

Ye Tian directly killed the Second Fortress of Heavenly Blood, but he was discovered in an instant.

For himself to be discovered, he felt that it was normal, the Heavenly Blood Battlefield was very important, and the Supreme Dao Void Demon was naturally strict with the monitoring here, if he shuttled like this, he would not be able to find him, and the Supreme Dao Void Demon would have been beaten to the point that it would have been defeated.

However, with the attack of a fivefold Supreme Dao realm, the Supreme Dao Void Demon naturally wouldn't pay too much attention to it.

......

Fortress of Celestial Blood II.

"Fivefold Supreme Dao Realm sneaks in and looks for death!"

Zhan He came out of the second fortress and went directly to intercept Ye Tian, and the other Dao Void Demons also followed, but the speed was a little slower.

Soon, Ye Tian met with Zhan He.

"It's you!"

Zhan He was shocked.

It was Ye Tian who came here, but then his face changed.

It's just because Ye Tian is no longer a fourfold Dao realm, but a fifth-fold Dao realm.

Originally, Ye Tian's combat power was second only to him, but now that he had broken through to the Fifth Rank Dao Realm, that strength would definitely be above him.

"Hold him down and wait for the other Supreme Void Demons to besiege him!"

Zhan He is in this idea.

So, he summoned the other Supreme Void Demons to come here.

But in the next second, he was terrified.

Rumble!

Ye Tian used the Dao Flow Body Technique to kill, and immediately stabbed with a shot, carrying the sixth sequence of Dao rules.

"The Sixth Sequence of Dao Rules, I ......"

Zhan He wants to scold people, this is too exaggerated, just five to the Dao realm to comprehend the sixth sequence of the Dao rules, either Ye Tian's talent demon to the entire Innate Origin Domain Alliance all peerless Tianjiao incomparable existence, or Ye Tian's background is very deep, and there is a backer behind him to constantly comprehend the sixth sequence of the Dao rules items.

Otherwise, it would be impossible for Ye Tian to comprehend the rules of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao!

Such a supreme realm actually ran to the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, isn't this bullying!

Zhan He couldn't dodge, urging all kinds of life-saving things, trying to resist it.

But the sixth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules is too terrifying, and Ye Tian's physical strength is far beyond the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm!

Burst!

Zhan River was pierced by a single shot, and his body began to crumble, but the life-saving thing kept him alive.

But he had no power to resist.

Rumble!!!

The sixth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules turned into a silk thread and strangled inside Zhan He's body, easily erasing the vitality of Zhan He.

In an instant, the battle river fell and died.

And the other Supreme Dao Void Demons who had just arrived were all stunned.

Even the battle river has been killed, how can they survive?
